idea-plugin.name: GCF - Graph Compact Format
idea-plugin.description:
GCF (Graph Compact Format): The AI-native wire format for structured data. 50-92% fewer tokens than JSON. 100% comprehension on every frontier model. Zero training required.

Every time an MCP server, agent, or tool sends structured data to an LLM, JSON wastes 81% of tokens on repeated field names and structural characters. GCF declares field names once in a header. Rows are positional pipe-separated values. Nested objects flatten into path columns. Same data, dramatically fewer tokens.

Syntax Highlighting

  • Full highlighting for .gcf files in all JetBrains IDEs
  • Headers, section markers, flattened path columns ("customer>name")
  • Symbol IDs, edge notation, strings, numbers, booleans, null/absent markers
  • Attachment declarations, pipe separators, quoted strings with escapes

The Numbers

  • 50-92% fewer tokens than JSON
  • 100% comprehension on every frontier model (Claude, GPT-5.5, Gemini, Grok)
  • 15/16 wins vs TOON across 16 real-world datasets
  • 43 billion+ lossless round-trips across 17 serialization formats
  • 6 SDK implementations: Go, TypeScript, Python, Rust, Swift, Kotlin

Adopted By

Speakeasy (Google, Verizon, Mistral AI, DocuSign, Vercel) · OmniRoute (6.1K stars) · NeuroNest · Open Data Products SDK (Linux Foundation)

Links

  • Documentation
  • Playground
  • Benchmarks
  • Specification
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • Spec v3.2: flattened path columns ("customer>name") highlighted correctly
  • Fixed anonymous section headers (## [N]{fields} without name)
  • Fixed indented attachment declarations

0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Syntax highlighting for GCF files via TextMate grammar
